query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, up.assigned_business_lines, up.territories 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Ryan%' OR u.name LIKE '%Amit%' OR u.name LIKE '%Dan%'
LIMIT 10;
command:
